title: Opportunity Sizing in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger opportunity sizing in practice judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Opportunity Sizing in Practice is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Opportunity Sizing in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good opportunity sizing in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Opportunity Sizing in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
